title: Lab 39: SSH Key Authentication and Rsync
description: Configure key-based SSH access and securely transfer files between systems.

tasks.title: Create the user mesh39 on both clientvm and
tasks.prompt: Create the user mesh39 on both clientvm and servervm. Set the password on both systems to cinder9.

tasks.title: generate an ED25519 SSH key pair with no passphrase
tasks.prompt: As user mesh39 on clientvm, generate an ED25519 SSH key pair with no passphrase.

tasks.title: Configure passwordless SSH access for mesh39 from
tasks.prompt: Configure passwordless SSH access for mesh39 from clientvm to servervm using public key authentication.

tasks.title: Using rsync over SSH, copy the directory
tasks.prompt: Using rsync over SSH, copy the directory /home/mesh39/client-data/ from clientvm to /home/mesh39/server-data/ on servervm.

hints: Use the mesh39 account for the SSH key work.
Verify the transfer by checking the copied file on servervm through SSH.
